rationale: In the citing paper, Toubia et al. (2018) is cited only in grouped lists of prior studies that applied existing topic models to creative documents. The citation helps provide broad background and motivate the claim that prior models did not capture residual novelty and document-summary joint structure, but the paper does not discuss this specific study's method or findings in detail. There is no clear evidence of direct method transfer, conceptual dependence, or empirical reuse tied specifically to this cited work.
